name: The Specter
learned: The Specter is a mysterious, haunting figure that controls the curse of the Lawrence Estate. It is the embodiment of the curse itself, appearing intermittently and exerting influence over the mansion and those who enter it.
currently: The Specter haunts the Lawrence Mansion, appearing in fleeting glimpses or as a presence felt by those within its walls. It has a malevolent influence on the estate and its inhabitants, making it difficult for Ava to uncover the truth. Its intentions remain unclear, but it is determined to prevent the curse from being broken.
lifestyle: The Specter exists outside of time, its presence felt rather than seen. It occasionally interacts with the environment, causing unsettling occurrences and eerie phenomena throughout the mansion. It is not bound by the same rules as the living, and its motives remain shrouded in mystery.
